compiled_state.title: scripts/validate-issues.sh exceeds 1000-line SC (1010 lines)

compiled_state.description: validate-issues.sh is 1010 lines, violating the no-source-file->1000-lines SC from epic 0df8-1c8c. Pre-existing at start of epic; not in scope of any story. Extract validation helper functions to reduce below 1000 lines.

comments.body: Triaged (debug-everything): SC line-count/nesting violation — fix requires decomposition too large for autonomous fix. Deferred to end-of-session user review.
